name: kube_apiserver_metrics
explanation: The check inherits OpenMetricsBaseCheck and scrapes a single `/metrics` path on the kube-apiserver. The shipped auto_conf.yaml already enumerates the canonical secure ports (`possible_prometheus_urls: [https://%%host%%:6443/metrics, https://%%host%%:8443/metrics]`) — i.e. discovery is reduced to picking the first responding port. Authentication uses the in-cluster ServiceAccount bearer token mounted at `/var/run/secrets/kubernetes.io/serviceaccount/token`, supplied automatically by the Agent (pattern O), not by user input. This matches the OpenMetrics-port-scan generic shape.
notes: Spec also exposes a deprecated `scheme` field; modern usage just sets the scheme inside `prometheus_url` and relies on the in-cluster bearer token. Pattern O applies.
